parameters.name: hideOffsetting
parameters.description: When true, return 1 aggregated row per item with totals + net direction

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by line status; use ALL to return every status. TRANSFERRED lines are always excluded — query stock_transfers via temp_warehouse_lines.transfer_id for that audit trail.

parameters.name: includeTransferred
parameters.description: When true, also return TRANSFERRED-by-sale lines (those carrying an invoiceId) alongside the ACTIVE working set, each with invoiceId/invoiceNumber. Default (omitted) returns the ACTIVE working set only. Ignores the status filter.

parameters.name: hideBalanced
parameters.description: Hide items whose totalW2s equals totalS2w. Requires hideOffsetting=true; otherwise 400.

info.title: ERP API
info.description: OpenAPI 3 document for the ERP API. Regenerate the web SDK: `pnpm openapi:generate` (API must be reachable). Machine-readable spec: GET /docs-json

branchId.description: Branch to activate; must be one of the user's assigned branches.

code.description: Employee code, unique per organization (e.g. NV000002)

temporaryPassword.description: Temporary password set by the administrator; user is expected to change it on first login.

isActive.description: Whether the user can sign in. Defaults to true when omitted.

roleIds.description: Optional initial roles to assign on creation.

profile.description: Optional HR profile persisted alongside the user account.
HR profile to upsert. Provided child collections fully replace the existing set.

newTemporaryPassword.description: New temporary password the administrator wants to set for the user.

roleIds.description: Replaces the entire role set for the user with this list.

branchIds.description: Replaces the entire branch assignment set for the user with this list.

permissionKeys.description: Permission keys to attach when the role is created. May be empty.
Replaces the entire permission set for the role with this list.

organizationId.description: Tenant isolation key — every row belongs to exactly one organization.

branchId.description: Optional branch scope; null for org-wide records.

createdBy.description: UUID of the user who created this record.

defaultCreditDays.description: Default credit days used to prefill the POS due-date modal; null when unset.
Default credit days; send null to clear.

party.description: Đối tượng (counterparty — matches the transporter user's full name)

date.description: Ngày (transfer date — single date + compare operator =/<\/<=/>/>=)

dateRange.description: Khoảng thời gian (Từ ngày / Đến ngày từ thanh PeriodFilter) — inclusive.

sourceStorageId.description: Kho xuất — source storage for this line (branch-scoped path).

destinationStorageId.description: Kho nhập — destination storage for this line.

organizationId.description: Tenant isolation key — every row belongs to exactly one organization.

branchId.description: Optional branch scope; null for org-wide records.

paymentMethod.description: Settlement method. CASH posts a cash movement + auto Phiếu chi on post.

cashAccountId.description: Cash account to pay from — required when paymentMethod=CASH.

organizationId.description: Tenant isolation key — every row belongs to exactly one organization.

branchId.description: Optional branch scope; null for org-wide records.

createdBy.description: UUID of the user who created this record.

branchId.description: Branch the session belongs to — required

direction.description: Direction of this session/line: warehouse_to_showroom (w2s) or showroom_to_warehouse (s2w). Selects/opens the per-direction session.

warehouseStorageId.description: Warehouse-side storage for this session; resolved to its default location. Falls back to branch main storage when omitted. Only honored when opening the session.

showroomStorageId.description: Showroom-side storage for this session; resolved to its default location. Falls back to branch main showroom when omitted. Only honored when opening the session.

sourceLocationId.description: Shelf/location on the source side of the movement

branchId.description: Branch whose ACTIVE direction sessions are closed

lineIds.description: IDs of ACTIVE lines in the session to materialize into stock transfer(s).

notes.description: Free-form note attached to the resulting stock transfer(s).

organizationId.description: Tenant isolation key — every row belongs to exactly one organization.

branchId.description: Optional branch scope; null for org-wide records.

createdBy.description: UUID of the user who created this record.

countedAt.description: Ngày + giờ kiểm kê thực tế (ISO 8601)

purpose.description: Mục đích — free-text purpose written by user on the form.

plannedDate.description: Kiểm kê đến ngày — planned cutoff date chosen in the create dialog (date only, no time).

countedAt.description: Ngày + giờ kiểm kê thực tế — defaults to now() on create.

conclusion.description: Kết luận — conclusion text shown at the bottom of the form.

generatedReceiptId.description: IDs of the goods-receipt/goods-issue documents auto-generated by process().

mergedIntoId.description: Set on source vouchers after they are saved into a merged stock-take.

mergeSourceIds.description: Audit trail retained on the merged voucher.

organizationId.description: Tenant isolation key — every row belongs to exactly one organization.

branchId.description: Optional branch scope; null for org-wide records.

createdBy.description: UUID of the user who created this record.

reason.description: Nguyên nhân — reason text for the variance on this line.

countedAt.description: Ngày + giờ kiểm kê thực tế (ISO 8601)

kind.description: PRODUCT = parent product grouping variants; ITEM = standalone item without a parent product.

id.description: Product id when kind=PRODUCT, otherwise the standalone item id.

imageUrl.description: Image URL placeholder — always null until image storage is implemented.

minPrice.description: Lowest selling price among the visible variants.

maxPrice.description: Highest selling price among the visible variants.

unit.description: Unit of measure of the representative variant.

variantCount.description: Number of visible variants (1 for a standalone item).

quantityOnHand.description: Total on-hand quantity at the branch across all variants and locations.
Total on-hand quantity of this variant at the branch.

attributes.description: Variant dimensions of the product (empty for a standalone item).

organizationId.description: Tenant isolation key — every row belongs to exactly one organization.

branchId.description: Optional branch scope; null for org-wide records.

createdBy.description: UUID of the user who created this record.

lineDiscount.description: Server-computed discount amount; ignored when lineDiscountType is set.

lineDiscountType.description: Manual per-line discount type; when set, the server computes lineDiscount from lineDiscountValue.

lineDiscountValue.description: Raw discount value: 10 means 10% when type=percent; a currency amount when type=amount.

lineDiscountReason.description: Free-text reason/label for the discount, e.g. "cc".

items.description: Line items belonging to this draft, ordered by sortOrder.

customer.description: Resolved customer for the invoice (null when no customer is attached).

organizationId.description: Tenant isolation key — every row belongs to exactly one organization.

branchId.description: Optional branch scope; null for org-wide records.

createdBy.description: UUID of the user who created this record.

paymentAccountId.description:
The configured `payment_accounts` row this payment goes into — e.g. which bank
account a transfer landed in. The server validates the mapping belongs to the
actor's org + branch and matches `paymentMethod`, then derives the receiving COA
account; clients never send a COA account id directly.

Optional: when omitted the server falls back to the single account configured
for the method, and rejects the request if more than one exists.

dueDate.description:
Credit due date (ISO `YYYY-MM-DD`). Stored on the debt record when the sale
leaves a remaining balance (DEBT / PARTIAL_DEBT). Ignored when fully paid.

creditDays.description: Credit term in days entered at checkout (per invoice).

payments.description: Payment lines. Empty array = full debt (requires a customer on the invoice).

points.description: Number of loyalty points to redeem against this invoice

originalInvoiceItemId.description: Required in REGULAR mode — points back to the original SALE invoice_item.

returnLines.description: Items being returned (direction=IN). Must reference original SALE lines.

newLines.description: New items being purchased (direction=OUT). Same shape as a normal SALE.

cashAccountId.description: Required when refundMethod = CASH AND no active drawer session is found.

receivableAccountId.description: Required when refundMethod = OFFSET against an original AR (debt) invoice.

creditLiabilityAccountId.description: Required when refundMethod = STORE_CREDIT (target liability GL).

creditExpiresAt.description: Optional expiry date for the issued store credit (ISO date).

payments.description: Payments — only required for EXCHANGE with netAmount > 0.

customerId.description: Mã / tên khách hàng — filter by customer UUID

search.description: Free-text: matches invoice code OR customer name OR customer phone

organizationId.description: Tenant isolation key — every row belongs to exactly one organization.

branchId.description: Optional branch scope; null for org-wide records.

createdBy.description: UUID of the user who created this record.

branchId.description: Optional branch scope; null for org-wide records.

createdBy.description: UUID of the user who created this record.

scope.description: "all" = every branch the actor may read; "group" = the listed storeIds.

storeIds.description: Selected branch ids (used when scope = "group"; ignored for "all").

statDateType.description: Which date column the period filters on (default invoice_date).

issuedAt.description: Report period — enforced present by the search handler.

store.description: Multi-store consolidation scope; absent ⇒ actor's own branch.

invoiceStatus.description: Multi-select invoice status; preferred over the single `status` below.

status.description: Legacy single-status filter; kept for back-compat (use invoiceStatus).

customerId.description: Optional person filters (used by per-line reports; absent = all).

categoryId.description: revenue-by-item / per-line reports — filter by item category (Nhóm hàng hóa).

brand.description: revenue-by-item only — filter by denormalized item brand (Thương hiệu).

allocateComboRevenue.description: revenue-by-item only — split combo revenue across components.

reportType.description: Which backend report definition to run.

columns.description: Selected column keys (fixed registry keys + dynamic `payment.method.<coaAccountId>`).

displayName.description: User-renamed label; empty/blank ⇒ persisted as null (falls back to catalog name).

order.description: Ignored on persist — the server stamps order from array position.

branchId.description: Optional branch scope; null for org-wide records.

party.description: Đối tượng (counterparty — matches provider.name or targetBranch.name)

purpose.description: Loại chứng từ (purpose enum: OTHER | SALE | TRANSFER_OUT | DISPOSAL)

date.description: Ngày (created date range — GoodsIssueEntity has no dedicated issue date)

totalAmount.description: Tổng tiền (computed line total: SUM(quantity * unit_price))

locationId.description: Per-line bin; falls back to header locationId when omitted.

importGoodsReceiptId.description: GoodsReceipt spawned when the destination branch confirms import — the import_reference.

organizationId.description: Tenant isolation key — every row belongs to exactly one organization.

branchId.description: Optional branch scope; null for org-wide records.

createdBy.description: UUID of the user who created this record.

sourceStorageId.description: Source warehouse (storage) to pull this line from at export; null falls back to the header source storage.

sourceLocationId.description:
Source bin this line is issued from — resolved from stock (the bin holding
the most of this item in the source storage) at create time, so the locked
goods-issue form can display + submit it. Null for legacy rows / no stock.

counterpartyKind.description:
Đối tượng kind (supplier | customer | employee). When set, the service
 validates the counterparty and routes supplier→provider_id, customer /
 employee→counterparty cols (provider_id null).

sourceBranchId.description: Source branch for transfer-in. Stored separately from referenceId.

references.description: FE-supplied reference codes shown as Tham chiếu.

paymentMethod.description: Settlement on post: CASH posts a cash movement + auto Phiếu chi; CREDIT posts a payable JE.

cashAccountId.description: Cash account to pay from; defaults to the branch cash fund when omitted.

sourceBranchId.description: Convenience: source branch for TRANSFER_IN — orthogonal to referenceId (which points to a stock-transfer doc).

counterparty.description:
Transient (not a column): the resolved "Đối tượng" { kind, id, code, name }
inlined by the v2 search handler / getById so the FE renders supplier,
customer and employee counterparties alike (provider_id is null for the
latter two).

organizationId.description: Tenant isolation key — every row belongs to exactly one organization.

branchId.description: Optional branch scope; null for org-wide records.

createdBy.description: UUID of the user who created this record.

purpose.description: Loại chứng từ (purpose enum: PURCHASE | OTHER | TRANSFER_IN | STOCK_TAKE)

purposes.description: Explicit purpose allow-list, used by separated Mua hàng / Kho hàng menus.

excludePurposes.description: Purpose deny-list, used so Kho hàng does not show Mua hàng documents.

totalAmount.description: Tổng tiền (computed line total: SUM(quantity * unit_price))

locationId.description: Header location; derived from the first line when omitted.

code.description: Mã lý do (slug). Tự sinh từ name nếu không cung cấp.

name.example: Hàng hỏng do bảo quản chưa tốt

code.description: Mã lý do (slug). Tự sinh từ name nếu không cung cấp.

name.example: Hàng hỏng do bảo quản chưa tốt

preset.description: Period preset; used when `period` is absent. Default: this_month.

period.description: Custom period (inclusive ISO dates). Wins over `preset` when set.

store.description: Multi-store scope. Absent or scope="all" ⇒ org-wide (legacy parity).

warehouseIds.description: Storage (warehouse) ids — resolved to their locations by the backend.

unit.description: Filter by unit name — applied in-memory on result rows.

brand.description: Filter by denormalized item brand — applied in-memory on result rows.

sourceStoreId.description: transfer-by-store only — source branch; default = actor's branch.

hideZeroRows.description: Hide rows with all-zero measures (stock-period reports; default true).

reportType.description: Which backend report definition to run (see INVENTORY_REPORT_KEYS).

columns.description: Selected column keys (fixed keys + dynamic `branch.qty.<branchId>` for the pivot).

branchId.description: Exact branch filter (entity is organization-scoped; this is a filter, not a scope)

type.description: Account type (ASSET / LIABILITY / EQUITY / REVENUE / EXPENSE)

fullName.description: Full name — matched over CONCAT(firstName, ' ', lastName)
